Clumio user guide

Updated Fri, Apr 24, 2026

Clumio protects AWS assets such as S3, EBS volumes, EC2 instances, DynamoDB tables, and RDS resources. Clumio provides end-to-end encryption, Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA), and access audits to ensure your data is always secure.

Some features mentioned in this user guide are available only by request. To request a feature, contact support@clumio.com.
